Off Calendar Sep-04-2024 Continued To Feb-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order To Transfer Decedents Accounts
Off Calendar Sep-04-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Katie Parker appeared by zoom for Emily Magano (petitioner).

Mrs. Parker stated that Apple is specifically requesting an order from the court, that she wants all of the e-mails because they want to make sure they don't miss anything when marshalling the assets, and that if a catalogue is better for the court, she can do that but it means they will have to come back and it will take longer. Mrs. Parker also stated that she does not have any sense on how much data there might be and that she has not heard of any objections. The Petition for Order to Transfer Decedent's Accounts is under submission with the court's intent to grant. The court also grants the request for extension of time to file the inventory and appraisal. The status hearing on close of the estate currently set for October 29, 2024, is continued to February 5, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition For Order To Transfer Decedents Accounts
Off Calendar Aug-20-2024 Continued To Sep-04-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order To Transfer Decedents Accounts
Off Calendar Jun-25-2024 Continued To Aug-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order To Transfer Decedents Accounts
Off Calendar Apr-16-2024 Continued To Jun-25-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-24-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Cyn Haueter, Esq., via Zoom, for Petitioner.

The court confirms with counsel that she is unaware of any objections to the petition pending before the court. The Court queries counsel re the request for additional authority over the decedent's digital assets. Counsel offers advocacy for the request.

Upon conclusion of discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cabrera. Not Reported.
